name: GLM-4.6
tagline: Coding-focused flagship: 355B-class MoE (~357B params), context expanded from 128K to 200K; MIT license.

overview: GLM-4.6 is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM (flagship) line. Released 2025-09-30. Z.ai's frontier flagship large language model line, built for reasoning, agentic workflows and long-horizon coding, with open weights.
What's notable in this version: Coding-focused flagship: 355B-class MoE (~357B params), context expanded from 128K to 200K; MIT license.
